notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Carter Jensen out at 2nd. Lane Thomas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Michael Massey singles on a ground ball to center fielder Nathan Church. Jac Caglianone scores. Michael Massey to 2nd. Michael Massey advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Nathan Church.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds into a double play, first baseman Jac Caglianone to shortstop Tyler Tolbert to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Alec Burleson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Seth Lugo picks off Jordan Walker at 1st on throw to first baseman Jac Caglianone.

notableEvents.label: Masyn Winn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn grounds into a double play, second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Lars Nootbaar out at 2nd. Masyn Winn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Michael Massey singles on a ground ball to center fielder Nathan Church. Jac Caglianone scores. Michael Massey to 2nd. Michael Massey advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Nathan Church.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Michael Massey singles on a ground ball to center fielder Nathan Church. Jac Caglianone scores. Michael Massey to 2nd. Michael Massey advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Nathan Church.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín grounds out, third baseman Nick Loftin to first baseman Jac Caglianone.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín grounds into a force out, shortstop Tyler Tolbert to second baseman Michael Massey. Bryan Torres out at 2nd.
